measurement: range-dependent auto-aim CORE-HIT rate (SMG normal attacks)
focusReason: solo recording — only unit on field, so all normal-attack popups are hers

fightClockOffset.note: fight_clock = video_time - offset, derived from the top-right MM:SS countdown (fight t = 180 - remaining). Read the countdown AT each window rather than assuming a constant offset; observed video-minus-fight drifts ~6s early to ~2s late (integer-second rounding + minor clock drift).

colourConvention.coreDef: CORE = any RED popup; NON-CORE = white or orange-only

excluded: Chisato's ~472% true-damage periodic proc (big distinct popups >500k, e.g. 566125 / 849187 / 1293108)
cyan BLOCK! (boss attack blocked, not damage)
red 'TARGET'/'CANCEL' targeting UI text near crosshair
method: Per band, sampled ~6 full-res crosshair-region frames spaced ~1.5s (independent stacks; SMG popups live <0.6s) well inside the band, avoiding transitions and reload gaps. Counted distinct legible normal-attack popups and classified core (red) vs non-core (white/orange).

bands.note: The two near windows disagree (38% vs 22%) — pose/animation-dependent core exposure adds variance beyond pure range.

bossDistanceCrossCheck: Boss apparent size/distance matches the range-band labels exactly: near bands show a large close boss, mid a medium boss, midfar intermediate, far a small receded boss.
findings: Chisato SMG auto-aim core rate is STRONGLY range-dependent and monotonic: near ~29% > mid ~14% ~= midfar ~13% > far ~7%.
All bands are FAR below the sim's AUTO_CORE_RATE 0.85 constant for this weapon/target (open-questions A9) — for a SMG vs this raid boss the realized core rate is ~0.07-0.30, not 0.85.
mid and midfar are statistically indistinguishable at this sample size (~30 normals each); the clear separation is near-vs-far.
caveats: Counts are approximate: dense overlapping popup stacks and pose-dependent core exposure give roughly +/-5-8% per band. Sample sizes ~29-58 classified normals/band. Trend confidence is higher than absolute per-band values.
